---
title: "download_ascat_4hr.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../ascat.html)

Downloads ASCAT-C 4-hour wind files and generates value-added CoastWatch products.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/ascat/scripts/download_ascat_4hr.py >}}
```

:::
